videos.headline: Michigan Wolverines vs. Oklahoma Sooners: Full Highlights
videos.description: Michigan Wolverines vs. Oklahoma Sooners: Full Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Michigan Wolverines vs. Oklahoma Sooners: Full Highlights) 2025/09/06 ESHEET

videos.headline: Highlight: No. 18 Oklahoma's consistency wears down No. 15 Michigan
videos.description: Transfer QB John Mateer records a passing and rushing TD for his eighth consecutive game, the longest active streak in FBS, as the Sooners grind out a 24-13 victory over the Wolverines.

videos.headline: Deion Burks scampers into the end zone for Oklahoma
videos.description: Deion Burks scores a 9-yard touchdown to give Oklahoma an early 7-0 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Deion Burks scampers into the end zone for Oklahoma) 2025/09/06 ESHEET

videos.headline: Oklahoma's John Mateer is picked off by TJ Metcalf
videos.description: John Mateer overthrows his receiver and TJ Metcalf is there to pick it off for Michigan.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Oklahoma's John Mateer is picked off by TJ Metcalf) 2025/09/06 ESHEET

videos.headline: Bryce Underwood gets into it with a teammate on the sideline
videos.description: Bryce Underwood and Justice Haynes get into it on the sideline and have to be separated by teammates.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Bryce Underwood gets into it with a teammate on the sideline) 2025/09/06 ESHEET

videos.headline: Oklahoma's John Mateer keeps it for a TD
videos.description: John Mateer powers into the end zone to extend Oklahoma's lead over Michigan.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Oklahoma's John Mateer keeps it for a TD) 2025/09/06 ESHEET

videos.headline: Justice Haynes scores on Michigan's first play of 2nd half
videos.description: Justice Haynes puts Michigan on the board with a 75-yard touchdown to start the second half.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Justice Haynes scores on Michigan's first play of 2nd half) 2025/09/06 ESHEET

videos.headline: John Mateer scores his 2nd rushing TD vs. Michigan
videos.description: John Mateer gets great blocking and keeps it to give Oklahoma a 21-7 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (John Mateer scores his 2nd rushing TD vs. Michigan) 2025/09/06 ESHEET

videos.headline: Justice Haynes runs for 75-yard rushing touchdown
videos.description: Justice Haynes runs for 75-yard rushing touchdown

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Justice Haynes runs for 75-yard rushing touchdown) 2025/09/06 ESHEET

videos.headline: John Mateer scores 10-yard rushing touchdown
videos.description: John Mateer crosses goal line for 10-yard rushing touchdown

videos.headline: John Mateer: I'm so proud of my teammates in win vs. Michigan
videos.description: John Mateer praises his teammates and coaches for their effort in the team's win against Michigan.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Interview (John Mateer: I'm so proud of my teammates in win vs. Michigan) 2025/09/07 ESHEET
